name: Rachel Dempsey
text: Working with Eric on our bathroom remodel was seamless. He is an excellent communicator, provides clear estimates, and his attention to detail is unmatched. I appreciated his thoughtful recommendations throughout the process to ensure the space was functional and beautiful at the end. We would absolutely work with Heartwood Craft again.

name: Ashley Phillips
text: Working with Heartwood Craft was a pleasure. Eric was easy to work with and very thorough. He provided clear mock-ups and estimates. I also learned a lot in the process. I would not hesitate to reach out to him for any future project we have.

name: Susan McCauley
text: Eric did a great job on my deck replacement. He has great skills and experience. He was really good at communicating, totally responsible and I would certainly use him again. Thanks Eric.
